programmes.show_description: (2022) Gory horror with Sosie Bacon. Following a traumatic incident, a psychiatrist is haunted by a malevolent, gurning presence that drives people to gruesomely kill themselves. Or is she?

programmes.show_name: The Kid Who Would Be King
programmes.show_description: (2019) Fantasy adventure. A 12-year-old from modern-day suburbia finds King Arthur's sword Excalibur and must save the country from a sinister sorceress. With Patrick Stewart.
(1969) Award-winning historical drama based on the life of Anne Boleyn starring Richard Burton, Genevieve Bujold, who won a Golden Globe for the role, and Anthony Quayle.
(1998) Elijah Wood and Morgan Freeman star in the sci-fi disaster movie about impending meteorite-related disaster, attempts to destroy it, and possibly some cataclysmic havoc.
Director Peter Berg and stars Rihanna, Brooklyn Decker and Taylor Kitsch talk about making the seaborne sci-fi blockbuster Battleship.

programmes.show_name: Sister Act 2: Back in the Habit
programmes.show_description: (1993) Comedy sequel starring Whoopi Goldberg and Lauryn Hill. Deloris - who's now made it big in Vegas - goes back undercover as a teacher to help a struggling school choir find its voice.
(2017) Fantasy adventure starring Matt Damon and Willem Dafoe. In 11th-century China, Europeans seeking the secret of gunpowder are caught up in a war against alien monsters.
(2010) Chris Morris's farce about home-grown British jihadis. Riz Ahmed and Kayvan Novak star. Contains strong language throughout, some that may offend/violence.
(2022) Darkly comic social media satire. Wannabe influencer Danni Sanders (Zoey Deutsch) creates a fake Insta-life, but her lies spiral out of control in the real world. With Dylan O'Brien.

(1960) Fantasy adventure. Claude Rains plays a scientist who, convinced that dinosaurs still roam the earth, sets off into the Amazon to find them. Based on Sir Arthur Conan Doyle's novel.
(2007) Animated comedy. When Homer's love for a pig causes world-threatening pollution, Springfield gets enclosed in a huge dome. D'oh! Will he do the decent thing and save his neighbours?
(2022) Family comedy with Michael Peña. A young lad discovers that his slacker dad is a superhero. And before he's got used to the idea, he must foil a villain's plot to bring his dad down.
(1972) Action adventure. Gene Hackman stars as a priest who leads a ragtag group of survivors on a life-or-death quest to escape from the capsized ocean liner Poseidon.
(2016) Toby Jones and Catherine Zeta-Jones lead a stellar cast in a reboot of the comedy classic. The hapless Home Guard platoon gets involved with D-Day. But there's a spy in their midst.
(2018) Revenge thriller with Jennifer Garner. A mum turns vigilante on a quest for justice when her husband and daughter are murdered by a drug cartel.
(2023) Maximilian Erlenwein's breath-holding underwater survival thriller about two sisters on a fateful diving expedition, starring Louisa Kause and Sophie Lowe.
